_comment: Section metadata for the Company Master editor in the web app. Field editors are rendered generically from company-master.json; this file supplies human labels, help text, and which templates consume each section.

company.label: Company Information
company.help: Core identity. Feeds every document. fiscal_year_end drives the entire compliance calendar (MM-DD).

incorporator.label: Incorporator
incorporator.help: Person who signs the Certificate of Incorporation and the Action of Sole Incorporator.

registered_agent.label: Registered Agent
registered_agent.help: Delaware registered agent (e.g., a commercial agent service). Required on the Certificate of Incorporation.

securities.label: Capital Structure
securities.help: Authorized/outstanding shares, par value, CUSIP, ticker. Blank-check preferred is standard for OTC issuers. Outstanding shares must always reconcile to issuance_history.

officers.label: Officers
officers.help: All executive officers with bios. Pink disclosure requires name, title, and background of every officer.

directors.label: Directors
directors.help: All board members. Delaware requires at least one. Disclosure requires bios and other public-company board seats.

beneficial_owners_over_5pct.label: 5%+ Beneficial Owners
beneficial_owners_over_5pct.help: Every person or entity beneficially owning more than 5% of any class. Required disclosure item.

issuance_history.label: Share Issuance History
issuance_history.help: Every issuance since inception (or last 2 fiscal years + interim for disclosure): date, holder, shares, consideration, exemption relied upon, restricted status. Transfer agents and market makers will demand this reconcile perfectly.

service_providers.label: Service Providers
service_providers.help: Transfer agent (must be SEC-registered and in the OTC Transfer Agent Verified Shares Program — required for OTCID), securities counsel, accountant (GAAP; PCAOB only needed for OTCQB/QX), sponsoring market maker.

banking.label: Banking
banking.help: Corporate bank account status (board consent authorizes opening).

otc.label: OTC Status
otc.help: Where the company is in the quoting process. profile_verified_date drives the 6-month re-verification reminder.
